name: Oatmeal-Applesauce Bread - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the liquids and yeast.
4. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
5. Add the oatmeal and applesauce, then mix well.
6. Fold in the cinnamon.
7. Place the batter in the bread pan and cover with foil.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
